title: Kena’s Grove & the Myconid Colony
bodyText:
The destination the vines have been guiding the party toward. Kena's home — grove and druid fused into one living system — plus the myconid colony she founded. Where **Eira** was raised. S14 prep has it under attack from multiple factions the moment the party arrives.

# Threads
[[kennarea]] · [[the-sickness]]
